popularStory.description:
BIOe:  Duke of Bavaria; Pfalzgraf of Bavaria, 1158; made Duke of Bavaria after the fall of Henry "the Lion," 1180.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BAVARIA.htm#OttoIDukedied1183B as of 4/28/20 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern於1130年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆時，他的父親Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern47歲，母親Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf27歲。他於1169年與Agnes van Loon在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1183年7月11日在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 希格馬利根普福倫多福享年53歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern于1130年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆时，他的父亲Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern47岁，母亲Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf27岁。他于1169年与Agnes van Loon在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1183年7月11日在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 希格馬利根普福倫多福享年53岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆也。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: 'der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Rotkopf'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Hyman, Ari.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone with red hair, from Middle High German rōt ‘red’ + kopf ‘head’, German rot + Kopf.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern was born in 1130, in Kelheim, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, was 47 and his mother, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, was 27. He married Agnes van Loon in 1169, in Kelheim, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 11 July 1183, in Pfullendorf, Sigmaringen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 53, and was buried in Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern est né en 1130, à Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes van Loon en 1169, à Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1183, à Pfullendorf, Landkreis Sigmaringen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern 1130 in Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern 47 und seine Mutter Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf 27. Er hat 1169 in Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Deutschland Agnes van Loon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juli 1183 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Pfullendorf, Landkreis Sigmaringen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern è nato il nel 1130 nel Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Agnes van Loon nel 1169, nel Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1183, nel Pfullendorf, Landkreis Sigmaringen, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayernが1130年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ケルヘイムで生まれた時，父Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayernは47歳，母Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorfは27歳であった。1169年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ケルヘイムでAgnes van Loonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1183年7月11日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス シグマリンジェンプフウレンドルフで53歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムシェイエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파아펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 슈예른
ko.lifeSummary: Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern(이)가 1130년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 켈하임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1169년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 켈하임에서 Agnes van Loon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1183년 7월 11일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 지그마잉 파렌도르프에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파아펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 슈예른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern nasceu em 1130, em Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes van Loon em 1169, em Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1183, em Pfullendorf, Landkreis Sigmaringen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Scheyern, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany: щиирн, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern родился в 1130 г. в местности ландкрис келхим, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes van Loon в 1169 г. в местности ландкрис келхим, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 июля 1183 г. в местности пфуллендорф, ландкрис сигмаринген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности щиирн, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto I. 'der Rotkopf' von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern nació en 1130, en Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Agnes van Loon en 1169, en Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1183, en Pfullendorf, Landkreis Sigmaringen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Scheyern, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania.
